_comment: MCP config template for the Monet server. Install it first: `npm i -g @team-monet/monet` (or use the npx command below). Register at USER scope for all projects (Claude Code: `claude mcp add --scope user monet -- monet start`, or merge into ~/.claude.json), or per-repo into ./.mcp.json. Storage defaults to the global ~/.monet (organized per project by circle); set env.MONET_STORAGE_DIR for a per-repo store.
